initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    store.s_store_name,
    item.i_category,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) - SUM(store_returns.sr_return_amt) AS total_profit
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_returns 
        ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store_returns.sr_store_sk 
        AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk 
        AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 1998 
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY 
    store.s_store_name, 
    item.i_category
ORDER BY 
    store.s_store_name, 
    item.i_category
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    store.s_store_name,
    item.i_category,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) - SUM(store_returns.sr_return_amt) AS total_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
LEFT JOIN store_returns ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store_returns.sr_store_sk 
    AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk 
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998 
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY store.s_store_name, item.i_category
ORDER BY store.s_store_name, item.i_category
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
  store.s_store_name,
  item.i_category,
  SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) - SUM(store_returns.sr_return_amt) AS total_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
LEFT JOIN store_returns 
  ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store_returns.sr_store_sk 
  AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk 
  AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998 
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY store.s_store_name, item.i_category
ORDER BY total_profit DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    s.s_store_name,
    i.i_category,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) - SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_profit
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
LEFT JOIN store_returns sr 
    ON ss.ss_store_sk = sr.sr_store_sk 
    AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk 
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk = sr.sr_returned_date_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 1998 
    AND d.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY s.s_store_name, i.i_category
ORDER BY s.s_store_name, i.i_category
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    store.s_store_name,
    item.i_category,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) - SUM(store_returns.sr_return_amt) AS total_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
LEFT JOIN store_returns 
    ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store_returns.sr_store_sk 
    AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk 
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998 
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 11
GROUP BY store.s_store_name, item.i_category
ORDER BY total_profit DESC
LIMIT 100;
